items.header: Wire the finished foul engine into the live game simulation

items.name: Correct the remaining teams we still rate too high or too low
items.header: Correct the remaining teams we still rate too high or too low

items.name: Let batched answers wait for the morning digest without churning
items.header: Let batched answers wait for the morning digest without churning
items.why: A non-blocking state so the reminder system does not thrash on a held answer.

items.name: Only spin up extra work lanes when the next item clears a value bar
items.header: Only spin up extra work lanes when the next item clears a value bar
items.why: Stops overnight sessions from over-spending on low-value tail work.

items.name: Reserve the heavy independent double-check for work that ships
items.header: Reserve the heavy independent double-check for work that ships

floor.label: 94 things are lined up in the work queue — a healthy runway (we keep at least 40 ready). (Queue last updated 24m ago.)

upcoming.note: These are the next things the system will work on — what each will be and why it matters. Tap to move an item to the top, bump it up, push it down, or shelf it. Items waiting on your call are parked until you answer — then they jump to the top.

coming_soon.header: Reply to alerts right in Discord
coming_soon.why: your Discord message becomes the decision — no tapping through to a form
coming_soon.note: needs a ~5-min one-time bot setup when it reaches the front of the queue.

reports.placeholder: Tonight's game reports land at 5:15pm ET.

rollover.label: rollover armed for tomorrow ✓
rollover.note: After 4am ET the board flips to the new day, files yesterday's reports under a dated header, and shows tonight's placeholder until the reports land at 5:15pm ET.
